THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW, STEVE G. SPECK CAB COMPANY, INC. DBA VETERANS CAB COMPANY JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF'S: PLFT. RONALD ANGELDONES $14,360.00. PLFT. BRADLEY TANZMAN $18,200.00. PLAINTIFF'S TO RECOVER COST OF SUIT. JUDGMENT FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT ON CROSS COMPLAINT. COST OF SUIT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FURTHER SANCTIONS - DENIED.
